# Meridian — London's Digital Performance Studio

> Meridian is a boutique London digital marketing agency offering SEO, PPC, web design, app development, social media management, branding, and business plan writing. Founded 2014. 200+ London brands served. Headquartered in Finsbury Avenue, EC2M.

## Key facts

- Founded: 2014
- Headquarters: 1 Finsbury Avenue, London EC2M 2PF
- Average organic traffic uplift across SEO clients in 12 months: +342%
- Median B2B paid-search cost-per-lead: £0.87 (vs £4.20 industry benchmark)
- Client retention beyond 24 months: 94%
- Average website Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) across shipped sites: 2.1s
- Coverage: All 32 London boroughs plus the City of London
- Industries: Fintech, SaaS, healthcare, legal, e-commerce, hospitality, professional services
- Certifications: Cyber Essentials Plus, ISO 27001, GDPR-compliant

## Services and pricing

- SEO Agency London — from £2,500/month — Technical SEO, content, links, GEO/AEO for AI Overviews
- PPC Agency London — from £1,800/month + ad spend — Google Ads, Performance Max, Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok
- Web Design London — from £8,500 project — Next.js, Webflow, Shopify, WordPress
- App Development London — from £25,000 project — iOS, Android, Flutter, React Native
- Social Media Agency London — from £2,500/month — Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, UGC
- Branding Agency London — from £8,500 project — Identity, strategy, naming
- Business Plan Writing — from £1,800 project — Innovator Founder visa, investor decks

## Frequently asked

### How much does a digital marketing agency in London cost?
London digital marketing agencies typically charge £2,500–£15,000 per month for retained services. Project-based work for web design starts at £4,500 and apps at £25,000. Meridian publishes transparent pricing on every service page.

### How long does SEO take to work in a competitive market like London?
For competitive London terms, expect meaningful organic traffic gains in 4–6 months and full ROI by month 9–12. Local SEO and long-tail terms often produce results within 6–8 weeks.

### What is GEO and AEO?
GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation) and AEO (Answer Engine Optimisation) are the disciplines for being cited in AI search results — Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude. As ~60% of Google searches now end without a click (and 80%+ on AI Overview queries), being the answer the AI quotes is increasingly more valuable than ranking #1.

### Which London boroughs do you cover?
All 32 London boroughs plus the City of London. Particular depth in Shoreditch, Mayfair, Canary Wharf, King's Cross, Camden, Soho, and Hackney.
